source.module: Get started with complex algorithmic problems

topicTags: Get started with complex algorithmic problems

content.problemStatement: Write a program to calculate the sum of the digits present in an alphanumeric string.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains an integer, T, denoting the number of test cases.
- Each of the next T lines contains a string consisting of lowercase/uppercase English letters, along with digits 0 to 9. (There shall be no space in the string)
content.outputFormat: - For each test case, print the sum of digits in each string.
